4e121bfc-0b7a-4623-b691-f0fddc07b7ab.doc_description: This document introduces "Attention Residuals" (AttnRes) and its scalable variant "Block AttnRes," novel mechanisms for replacing fixed residual accumulation in neural networks with learned, input-dependent depth-wise attention, addressing limitations of standard residual connections while optimizing memory, computation, and scalability for large-scale training and inference.
